summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Masterclass feature. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully. Features tested: Public endpoints (categories, list, filters, detail), Player bookmarks, Comments, Admin CRUD operations, Featured toggle, Access control.

issues: Markdown rendering shows raw ## symbols instead of proper headings - content shows '## Introduction' instead of formatted heading

Backend: GET /api/masterclass returns list of published masterclasses (100%)
Backend: GET /api/masterclass?category=medical_recovery filters correctly (100%)
Backend: GET /api/masterclass?difficulty=beginner filters correctly (100%)
Backend: GET /api/masterclass?featured=true filters featured (100%)
Backend: GET /api/masterclass?search=ACL searches correctly (100%)
Backend: GET /api/masterclass/{id} returns detail (100%)
Backend: GET /api/masterclass/{id}/comments returns comments (100%)
Backend: GET /api/masterclass/user/bookmarks requires auth (401/403) (100%)
Backend: GET /api/masterclass/user/bookmarks returns player bookmarks (100%)
Backend: POST/DELETE /api/masterclass/{id}/bookmark add/remove works (100%)
Backend: POST /api/masterclass/{invalid}/bookmark returns 404 (100%)
Backend: POST /api/masterclass/{id}/comments requires auth (100%)
Backend: POST/DELETE comment add/delete works (100%)
Backend: POST empty comment returns 400 (100%)
Backend: GET /api/admin/masterclass returns all masterclasses (100%)
Backend: GET /api/admin/masterclass requires admin (100%)
Backend: POST /api/admin/masterclass creates masterclass (100%)

Backend: PUT /api/admin/masterclass/{id} updates masterclass (100%)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/masterclass/{id} deletes masterclass (100%)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/masterclass/{id} toggle featured works (100%)
Backend: Player cannot create masterclass (403) (100%)
Backend: Player cannot delete masterclass (403) (100%)
Frontend: Masterclass Home - categories section displays 5 categories

Frontend: Masterclass Detail - title, author, duration, views shown

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Markdown content in masterclass detail is displayed as raw text (shows ## instead of rendered headings). Consider using a markdown renderer like react-markdown for proper formatting.
seed_data_creation: 4 sample masterclasses already seeded: ACL Recovery Guide, Striker Finishing Techniques, College Soccer Recruitment 101, Speed Training for Football
context_for_next_testing_agent: Masterclass feature fully tested and working. All CRUD operations verified. Bookmark and comment systems operational. 4 sample masterclasses exist with varied categories. Featured items show with yellow stars in both player and admin views. Video embeds work for YouTube URLs.
